description:
## Deep Audit V2: hx-theme

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-theme` component (theme provider/wrapper).

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — Token cascade correctness. Light/dark mode switching. Custom theme support.
2. **Accessibility** — Color contrast in all themes. Prefers-reduced-motion. Prefers-color-scheme.
3. **Functionality** — Theme application, nesting, dynamic switching, CSS custom property propagation.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict mode. No `any`. Proper types for theme variants.
5. **CSS Architecture** — Shadow DOM encapsulation. Token inheritance through shadow boundaries.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — `custom-elements.json` matches actual public API exactly.
7. **Test Coverage** — Vitest browser tests. 80%+ coverage. Theme switching tested.
8. **Storybook** — Stories for all theme variants.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Works in Twig templates without modification.
10. **Portability** — No framework dependencies. Works in vanilla HTML.

### wc-mcp Tool Usage (MANDATORY)
Use these MCP tools during your audit:
- `score_component({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — Get health score baseline
- `get_component({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — Full component details
- `analyze_accessibility({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — A11Y audit
- `list_css_parts({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — CSS Parts inventory
- `list_slots({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — Slots inventory
- `get_design_tokens({ tagName: "hx-theme" })` — Token usage

If any wc-mcp tool returns unexpected results or errors, report the bug to the wc-tools board at `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools`.

### Deliverables
- Fix all issues found inline
- Update tests to cover gaps
- Update Storybook stories if needed
- Ensure CEM is accurate after changes
- Run `npm run verify` before committing
title: DEEP AUDIT: hx-theme — Enterprise Component Quality Review
